## What changed and why

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR do and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Chore (deps, config, CI)
- [ ] Docs

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes
- [ ] Manually tested in browser (describe what you tested)
- [ ] Visual regression snapshots updated (`npm run test:visual:update`)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, include a before/after screenshot or screen recording. Delete if not applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Environment variables documented in `.env.local.example`
- [ ] Sentry errors are captured where appropriate
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
